raw_response: analysisWe need pick one player to vote. From discussion, Kevin claims Troublemaker, says he swapped with Jess. Jessica says she was Villager then Tanner. Kaelan says Drunk. Daniel uncertain. Likely a werewolf among them. Who seems suspect? Kevin claims Troublemaker but also says he swapped with Jess. That indicates he might be the Troublemaker originally. If he is Troublemaker, he swapped Jess and himself? Actually Troublemaker swaps two others; he says he swapped with Jess? He says "you guys getting the trouble." He claims Troublemaker. He says "Who did you trouble?" Daniel asks. Kevin says Jess. Then says "And me." So he swapped Jess and himself? That would mean he is not Troublemaker? Confusing. Likely Kevin is lying. Daniel seems uncertain. Jessica says she was Tanner. If she was Tanner, she wants to die. So she might be targeted. But village wants to kill werewolf. Who likely werewolf? Maybe Daniel? But Daniel says no good answer. Could be the werewolf. I'd vote Daniel.assistantfinal{"chosen_vote":"Daniel","justification":"The conversation shows Kevin claiming to be the Troublemaker and accusing Jessica of being the victim, yet his statements are contradictory and he appears to be manipulating the narrative.
